blocks.code:
(define colony (rb-state "mars_colony/colony.json"))
(define weather (get colony "weather"))
(define min-t (get weather "min_temp_c"))
(define max-t (get weather "max_temp_c"))
(define season (get weather "season"))
(define dust (get weather "dust_opacity"))
(define (hp-damage-per-sol min-temp)
  (cond ((< min-temp -80) 15)
        ((< min-temp -60) 8)
        ((< min-temp -40) 3)
        (else 0)))
(define damage (hp-damage-per-sol min-t))
(define sols-to-death (if (= damage 0) "infinite" (floor (/ 100 damage))))
(list (list "sol" (get colony "sol"))
      (list "earth-date" (get colony "earth_date"))
      (list "temp-range-c" (list min-t max-t))
      (list "season" season)
      (list "dust-opacity" dust)
      (list "hp-lost-per-sol-unheated" damage)
      (list "days-until-you-die-unheated" sols-to-death))
